listitem.para: Japanese use the term sensei when referring to older people. What does this term mean?
Distinguish between male and female communication styles.
What does “saving face” mean? How is “saving face” used when communicating with health-care providers?
List and explain at least three genetic health conditions common among the Japanese.
What is the word for Japanese traditional healers? When might one purchase Japanese herbs?
What terms are used to distinguish three generations of Japanese?
What is the traditional religion of the Japanese? What are some of its principal tenets?
Explain the concepts of yin and yang when referred to in health care.
Explain morita and naikan therapies. For what conditions are they used?
What is itami and how it is expressed?
